content: Just as the educational definition of reflexion frames it as a deliberate metacognitive practice for human language learning to correct misunderstandings and reinforce accurate concepts, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can borrow this structured, learning-oriented human reflexion framework to move beyond current inconsistent perspective-based contrast methods. This framing reframes LLM self-reflection not as a novel AI-specific trick, but as a reintroduction of the core metacognitive reflexion process that human learners have used for decades, adapted to large language model contexts.
